{
  "verdict": "legitimate",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "rationale": "The original code had an `if` statement that, if the condition was false, would fall through to the `isinstance(args[0], ...)` line without checking if `args` was empty, leading to an `IndexError`. The fix correctly combines the `filepath.lower().endswith` check with the `filepath.endswith(\".FITS\")` check into a single `return` statement, preventing the fall-through and resolving the `IndexError` for cases where `filepath` does not match the expected extensions."
}
